description: The HR department has received a batch of employee 'life events' (marriages, name changes, relocations) that need to be processed before the payroll cycle closes. A manifest detailing the required updates is located at ~/Desktop/life_events_manifest.txt. Log into Sentrifugo as admin (password: Admin@Sfugo24) and update the personnel records for the four employees specified in the manifest. Do not modify any fields or delete any existing data unless explicitly instructed to do so.
